rows.summary: 保留当前任务中的高价值运行时上下文，基于现有输入形成受控的 CMP 片段附着意图，并生成可执行的 operator guide 与 child guide；不改写根系统提示，仅在移交前附着受控片段。

details.operatorGuide: Preserve high-signal input and emit controlled pre-sections only.
details.checkerReason: The checked evidence is already consolidated and does not justify further structural edits.
details.dispatcherRouteRationale: Child seed packages enter only through the child ICMA path.
